description: GOV.UK Pay is a UK government payment platform that lets public sector services take online card and digital wallet payments and manage refunds and reporting. It is operated by the Government Digital Service for organisations using GOV.UK services.
summary: GOV.UK Pay exposes one documented REST API for payments at `https://publicapi.payments.service.gov.uk/v1`, authenticated with a service API key sent as a Bearer token in `Authorization`; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
